*ELASTIC

*MATERIAL, NAME=MAT2

*MATERIAL, NAME=MAT3

*SOLID SECTION, ELSET=EL1, MATERIAL=MAT1

*ELEMENT, ELSET=EL1, TYPE=CPS4

     2,           2,         3,        20,        19
